name: esp32c5_minimal_wiring
notes: ESP32-C5 minimal wiring validation pack — 7 experiments covering all major peripherals with only 3 short jumper wires. Run zero-wire group first, then add wires one at a time. Wire A: GPIO11→GPIO12 (UART0 loopback). Wire B: GPIO0→GPIO1 (GPIO/ADC). Wire C: GPIO7→GPIO2 (SPI MOSI→MISO).
